title: Outcome
description: Structured resolution result. At least one of accepted, rejected, or merged SHOULD be present. When the rejected list contains COMMITTED operations, the rollback field MUST be present (this is a runtime-state-dependent constraint that cannot be fully expressed in JSON Schema; implementations MUST enforce it).

rollback.description: MUST be present when rejected list contains COMMITTED operations. Value is a reference to a compensating OP_COMMIT, or 'not_required'. Rejecting intents or pre-commit proposals does not require this field.
